title: Chapter 64
content:
Chapter 64: Upgrade [1]

The early morning sunlight streamed through the window, crashing directly into Denzel’s eyes.

He flinched instinctively, his eyelids squeezing shut before slowly opening again.

A low groan escaped his lips as he was greeted by the relentless brightness pouring into the room.

He was still completely naked.

His gaze drifted downward, landing on Maria’s sleeping figure beside him.

She was naked as well, her face carrying a faint blush as though traces of last night’s passion still lingered even in her sleep.

The memories came rushing back immediately.

He remembered everything.

The two of them had gone at it until the sun had nearly risen, neither willing to stop until exhaustion finally caught up with them.

A grin slowly spread across his face.

His eyes wandered over her figure, appreciating every familiar curve.

’I swear, I never get tired of this woman’

’She’s so damn sexy’

’Every time I look at her, I just want her even more.’

The thought made his grin widen.

A moment later, his attention shifted toward the window where the sunlight continued to invade the room.

’With all the money I have now, I seriously need to buy some curtains.’

’This damn sunlight is basically an alarm clock.’

Shaking his head, he pushed himself upright and sat on the edge of the bed.

A groan left him as he stretched before rolling his shoulders and twisting his neck from side to side.

Several satisfying cracks echoed through the room.

’Brand new day. Brand new opportunities’

’Let’s see what I’ve got lined up today.’

His thoughts paused for a moment.

’Oh right’

’I still haven’t figured out who my second harem member is’

’After Sophia’s performance last night, I’m pretty sure it isn’t her’

’But since Maria is asleep I wonder if Sophia has work today’

’If she doesn’t, then that means she’s completely alone.’

A smirk tugged at the corner of his lips.

His gaze briefly dropped toward himself.

He already knew what the answer was.

After everything that had happened last night, he felt physically drained.

Still, the question lingered.

’Am I actually up for it?’

He considered it for a second.

’Eh, what the hell’

’I’m supposed to be teaching her a lesson anyway’

’She’s been playing games with me for far too long’

’Spending a little time with her wouldn’t be the worst thing in the world.’

The smirk returned.

But before he could continue that train of thought, a loud chime suddenly rang out.

His expression froze.

A second later, several system notifications materialized beside him.

But before his eyes could even read a single line of text, Maria’s bare arms wrapped gently around his chest from behind.

A moment later, her body pressed against his back.

Denzel’s eyes widened slightly, and his breath hitched for a moment as he felt the succulent softness of her mound sized breast press tightly against him.

’Oh my’

Denzel thought inwardly.

His eyes flickered to the side, catching sight of Maria as she rested her chin gently against his shoulder, holding him tightly from behind.

She looked comfortable, almost as though she had no intention of letting him go anytime soon.

"Good morning...’

"My king," she said softly.

’My king’

Denzel thought inwardly as he heard the words leave her lips.

’That has a nice ring to it, doesn’t it?’

"Hello, my sexy beloved."

Denzel returned her smile with one of his own.

Maria locked eyes with him for a moment before closing them

She leaned forward and pressed her lips against his, giving him a deep, affectionate kiss.

Their lips remained together for a brief moment before she slowly pulled away

A thin strand of saliva stretched between them before finally breaking.

Denzel simply stared at her, looking completely satisfied.

"How did you sleep?" he asked.

Maria chuckled softly.

"I barely slept at all."

"And whose fault was that?" Denzel asked with a grin.

"It’s all thanks to you, of course."

Denzel smirked.

"So what?"

"You don’t like it when I keep you up all night like a right cock starved bitch?"

Maria smiled warmly.

"You know very well that I do, my son."

As she said that, she leaned forward and kissed him once more.

Finally, she pulled back and looked at him lovingly.

"Stay in bed, please, my king"

"Let me get you something to eat."

Denzel gently rubbed his hand along her arm.

"Please"

"I already have something I want to eat right here."

Maria chuckled lightly.

"You naughty boy."

She shook her head with a smile.

"How about I get you something first, and then we’ll see?"

"Who knows, maybe we can have another round"

"Though I won’t guarantee that I’ll be quiet."

Denzel snorted and smiled at her.

"That’s exactly why I love you."

Maria smiled back at him.

Then she leaned in and gave him one last soft kiss before pulling away.

"Alright"

"Just give me a minute. I’ll be right back."

With that, she got out of bed and began walking toward the door.

As she moved away, Denzel watched her leave.

She glanced back over her shoulder and chuckled softly.

Denzel smirked.

"Go on. Be quick, or there’ll be some punishment waiting for you."

And then she smiled.

Her cheeks were still faintly flushed as she turned away.

She placed what was left of her robe down properly on her exposed body, then stepped back and walked out of the room. The door closed softly behind her.

For a moment, she remained just outside, and faint chuckles escaped her as she seemed amused by her own thoughts.

Inside the room, Denzel watched her leave.

’Yeah she’s definitely a member of my harem now’

’Mission officially successful’

’Hehe, now all that’s left is Sophia.’

But as his gaze drifted sideways, something suddenly caught his attention.

His expression changed instantly.

Not something he had expected.

Not something related to her at all.

It was the system notification.

He stared at it for a moment before reading it aloud in utter awe.

[Player has leveled up.]

— End of Chapter 64 —
